name: Context7
description: Search docs and code examples for any library with up-to-date context
longDescription: Context7 provides real-time documentation and code examples for popular libraries and frameworks. Search across thousands of packages and get relevant, version-aware context for your coding tasks.
author: Upstash

apiKeyConfig.label: Context7 API Key
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create an API key at context7.com/dashboard (starts with ctx7sk_)
